summary: Apply all improvements from DynamicContentCarousel, TestimonialsCarousel, and CardsCarousel: padding refactor, WAI-ARIA carousel pattern, color lock, and DQA fixes. GalleryCarousel is unique because it has a real dark card wrapper (bg-charcoal rounded-3xl) rather than a pseudo-element, which requires a different padding approach.

currentStructure.description: GalleryCarousel uses a real dark card div rather than a pseudo-element. The section has py-6 sm:py-16, and inside is container > div.dark.bg-charcoal with px-[18px] py-9 sm:px-8 sm:py-24, flex column with gap-8 sm:gap-16 between ThemeHeading and carousel.

targetStructure.description: Move padding from section to container. Keep the real dark card approach (bg-charcoal div) since GalleryCarousel has visual elements (noise texture, rounded corners with overflow) that require a real DOM element. The container gets py-18 md:py-23 to match other carousels. The dark card inner padding stays the same since it controls spacing inside the card.
hierarchy: div.flex.items-center.gap-4.mb-6 (controls row - fix gap from 8 to 4)
targetStructure.paddingRationale: Unlike DynamicContentCarousel/TestimonialsCarousel/CardsCarousel which use a CSS pseudo-element (before:bg-charcoal) for the dark background, GalleryCarousel needs a real DOM element for the noise texture SVG filter and overflow:hidden for the carousel. The pseudo-element approach cannot support child DOM elements. Therefore: section gets no padding + dark bg-transparent!, container gets py-18 md:py-23 (matching other carousels), and the dark card div stays as a real element inside the container.

changes.title: Remove section padding, add container padding
changes.description: Move vertical padding from section to container level to match the standard carousel pattern.

changes.to: theme_block_props( 'gallery-carousel dark bg-transparent!', empty( $heading ) ? 'aria-label="' . esc_attr__( 'Gallery Carousel', 'takt' ) . '"' : '' )
changes.reason: Remove section padding. Add dark bg-transparent! class. Add fallback aria-label when no heading (consistent with other carousels).
Add standardized padding to container (72px / 92px), matching DynamicContentCarousel, TestimonialsCarousel, and CardsCarousel.
Remove section padding, add dark bg-transparent! and conditional aria-label.
Add standardized padding to container.

changes.title: Fix button variant: primary -> secondary
changes.description: ThemeHeading buttons are showing primary variant instead of secondary. All dark-card carousels must use buttonVariations=['secondary'] to match design spec.

changes.action: Add 'buttonVariations' => [ 'secondary' ] to the ThemeHeading args array
changes.reason: Force secondary button variant, matching DynamicContentCarousel and TestimonialsCarousel.
Force secondary button variant in editor, matching DynamicContentCarousel and TestimonialsCarousel.

changes.title: Fix navigation arrow gap: gap-4 -> gap-2 md:gap-4
changes.description: Navigation arrows gap should be responsive: gap-2 on mobile, gap-4 on md+. Currently uses static gap-4.

changes.reason: Match DynamicContentCarousel, TestimonialsCarousel, CardsCarousel navigation gap pattern.
Match responsive gap pattern from other carousels.

changes.title: Fix controls row gap: gap-8 -> gap-4
changes.description: Controls row (pagination + navigation container) gap should be gap-4 (16px) not gap-8 (32px). All other carousels use gap-4.

changes.reason: Match DynamicContentCarousel (line 113), TestimonialsCarousel (line 64), CardsCarousel (line 41) controls row gap.
Match controls row gap from other carousels.

changes.title: Add aria-roledescription='carousel' to swiper-parent
changes.description: Add WAI-ARIA carousel pattern: swiper-parent gets aria-roledescription='carousel'.

changes.to: <div class="swiper-parent overflow-hidden grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1" aria-roledescription="<?php esc_attr_e( 'carousel', 'takt' ); ?>">
changes.reason: WAI-ARIA carousel pattern requires the carousel container to have aria-roledescription='carousel'.

changes.action: Add aria-roledescription={__('carousel', 'takt')} to the swiper-parent div
changes.reason: WAI-ARIA carousel pattern in editor.

changes.title: Add slide-level ARIA attributes via JS
changes.description: Add role='group', aria-roledescription='slide', and aria-label='Slide X of Y' to each slide. Since GalleryCarousel uses inner blocks (not server-rendered slides like DynamicContentCarousel), slides must be attributed via JS after Swiper initialization (same approach as CardsCarousel).

changes.action: Add updateSlideAriaAttributes() helper function (copy from CardsCarousel.js)
changes.reason: Handles loop mode duplicate slides correctly. Sets role='group', aria-roledescription='slide', aria-label='Slide X of Y' on real slides.
Apply ARIA attributes to initial slides.
Re-apply ARIA attributes when slides change (important for loop mode where Swiper creates duplicates).

changes.title: Add pagination aria-hidden='true'
changes.description: Progress bar pagination is decorative and should be hidden from assistive technology.

changes.reason: Progress bar is a visual indicator, not semantic navigation. Match DynamicContentCarousel.
Match DynamicContentCarousel pagination aria-hidden pattern.

changes.title: Add autoplay toggle button with Pause/Play icons
changes.description: When autoplay is enabled, add a toggle button before the pagination bar that allows users to stop/start slide rotation. Requires Pause.svg and Play.svg assets.

assets.reason: Autoplay toggle needs Pause icon (Play icon is inlined in JS as SVG string, matching other carousels).

changes.reason: Controls row must also show when autoplay is enabled (for the toggle button).

changes.add:
<?php if ( $autoplayCarousel ) : ?>
							<button
								class="carousel-autoplay-toggle carousel-nav-btn"
								aria-label="<?php esc_attr_e( 'Stop slide rotation', 'takt' ); ?>"
								data-label-pause="<?php esc_attr_e( 'Stop slide rotation', 'takt' ); ?>"
								data-label-play="<?php esc_attr_e( 'Start slide rotation', 'takt' ); ?>"
							>
								<?php theme_block_asset( 'Pause.svg' ); ?>
							</button>
						<?php endif; ?>
changes.reason: Autoplay toggle button with accessible labels and data attributes for JS toggling. Matches DynamicContentCarousel pattern exactly.

changes.action: Add import for Pause SVG: import { ReactComponent as PauseIcon } from './resources/Pause.svg';
changes.reason: Need Pause icon for the autoplay toggle button in editor.

changes.action: Change condition to include autoplayCarousel. Add autoplay toggle button before pagination.
changes.reason: Match PHP template structure.

changes.title: Add prefers-reduced-motion support and autoplay toggle JS logic
changes.description: Complete JS rewrite to match DynamicContentCarousel/CardsCarousel accessibility pattern: prefers-reduced-motion detection, autoplay toggle with icon swap, aria-live region management, and focus pause/resume behavior.

features.description: Check window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches at init. If true, disable autoplay regardless of data attribute.

Find .carousel-autoplay-toggle button. On click: stop/start autoplay, swap icon between Pause and Play SVGs, update aria-label from data attributes, toggle aria-live on .swiper-wrapper between 'off' (playing) and 'polite' (paused).
On .swiper-parent focusin: pause autoplay if currently playing. On focusout (when focus leaves carousel entirely): resume autoplay if was playing.
Add pauseOnMouseEnter: true and disableOnInteraction: false to autoplay config.
Add updateSlideAriaAttributes() function and call after init + on slideChange.

newStructure: - Init Swiper with pauseOnMouseEnter + disableOnInteraction: false
- If autoplayEnabled && autoplayToggle: set up toggle, aria-live, focus handlers

changes.title: Add neon-green gradient color lock CSS
changes.description: Create a CSS file that locks the gradient to neon-green/blue regardless of page accent color. This ensures the carousel nav button gradient hover always uses the brand neon-green color.

css.note: DynamicContentCarousel uses var(--color-neon-green) and var(--color-blue). TestimonialsCarousel uses raw rgba values rgba(212, 255, 69, 1) and rgba(71, 203, 242, 1). Prefer the CSS custom property approach (DynamicContentCarousel) for maintainability.

changes.title: Verify existing test variations and add missing ones
changes.description: The test page has 9 variations. Variation 7 already has autoplay+loop. Verify all variations render correctly after changes. Consider adding dedicated Loop-only and Autoplay-only variations if needed for testing the new autoplay toggle.

variationsToAdd.name: Loop Only (No Autoplay)
variationsToAdd.reason: Tests loop mode independently from autoplay. Verifies slide ARIA attributes update correctly on slideChange.

variationsToAdd.name: Autoplay Only (No Loop)
variationsToAdd.reason: Tests autoplay toggle button, aria-live management, and prefers-reduced-motion independently from loop.

verificationChecklist: Variation 7: autoplay toggle button visible, Pause icon shown initially
Variation 7: clicking toggle stops autoplay, shows Play icon, changes aria-label
Variation 10: loop works, no autoplay toggle button shown
Variation 11: autoplay toggle button visible, no loop
All variations: padding is py-18 md:py-23 on container
All variations with buttons: secondary variant shown (not primary)
All variations: controls row has gap-4
All variations with navigation: arrows have gap-2 md:gap-4
All slides: role='group', aria-roledescription='slide', aria-label='Slide X of Y'

blocks/GalleryCarousel/GalleryCarousel.p.description: Padding refactor, button variant fix, gap fixes, WAI-ARIA attributes, autoplay toggle button

blocks/GalleryCarousel/GalleryCarousel.t.description: Same changes as PHP for editor parity

blocks/GalleryCarousel/GalleryCarousel.j.description: Full rewrite: prefers-reduced-motion, autoplay toggle, aria-live, focus pause, slide ARIA attributes

risks.risk: Padding change may affect visual spacing inside dark card
risks.mitigation: The inner dark card div keeps its own px/py padding unchanged. Only the outer section-to-container padding changes. Visual comparison screenshots before/after will catch any discrepancies.

risks.risk: Loop mode + slide ARIA attributes: Swiper duplicates slides for loop, duplicates should not get ARIA attributes
risks.mitigation: Use CardsCarousel's updateSlideAriaAttributes() which filters out swiper-slide-duplicate class slides.

risks.risk: GalleryCarousel is slidesPerView:1 (unlike multi-slide carousels), autoplay toggle placement may differ visually
risks.mitigation: The autoplay toggle is placed in the same controls row as pagination/navigation, before the progress bar. With gap-4 it will be visually consistent.
